accounts.name: delegator_vote_marker
docs: be uninitialized; only its existence matters.

accounts.name: direct_vote_marker
docs: be uninitialized; only its existence matters.

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Treasury PDA — holds SOL for SendSol actions

accounts.name: treasury_token_account
docs: Pass any account (e.g. treasury PDA) for non-SendToken actions.

accounts.name: recipient_token_account
docs: Pass any account (e.g. treasury PDA) for non-SendToken actions.

errors.name: NameTooLong
errors.msg: DAO name max 64 chars

errors.name: InvalidQuorum
errors.msg: Quorum must be 1–100

errors.name: RevealWindowTooShort
errors.msg: Reveal window must be at least 5 seconds

errors.name: VotingDurationTooShort
errors.msg: Voting duration must be at least 5 seconds

errors.name: InvalidExecutionDelay
errors.msg: Execution delay must be non-negative

errors.name: TitleTooLong
errors.msg: Title max 128 chars

errors.name: DescriptionTooLong
errors.msg: Description max 1024 chars

errors.name: VotingNotOpen
errors.msg: Voting is not open

errors.name: VotingClosed
errors.msg: Voting period has closed

errors.name: AlreadyCommitted
errors.msg: Already committed a vote

errors.name: RevealTooEarly
errors.msg: Reveal phase has not started yet

errors.name: RevealClosed
errors.msg: Reveal window has closed

errors.name: RevealStillOpen
errors.msg: Reveal phase is still open

errors.name: NotCommitted
errors.msg: No commitment found for this voter

errors.name: AlreadyRevealed
errors.msg: Vote already revealed

errors.name: CommitmentMismatch
errors.msg: Commitment hash does not match

errors.name: AlreadyFinalized
errors.msg: Proposal has already been finalized

errors.name: InsufficientTokens
errors.msg: Not enough governance tokens

errors.name: NotAuthorizedToReveal
errors.msg: Not authorized to reveal this vote

errors.name: InvalidThreshold
errors.msg: Threshold must be 1–100

errors.name: Overflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: ProposalNotCancellable
errors.msg: Can only cancel voting proposals before any commit or reveal starts

errors.name: ProposalNotPassed
errors.msg: Proposal did not pass

errors.name: AlreadyExecuted
errors.msg: Treasury action already executed

errors.name: ExecutionTimelockActive
errors.msg: Execution timelock has not yet expired

errors.name: VetoWindowExpired
errors.msg: Veto window has expired — timelock has passed

errors.name: DelegationAlreadyUsed
errors.msg: This delegation has already been used

errors.name: NotDelegatee
errors.msg: Caller is not the designated delegatee

errors.name: WrongProposal
errors.msg: Delegation belongs to a different proposal

errors.name: InvalidDelegatee
errors.msg: Delegatee must be a real wallet and cannot self-delegate

errors.name: SelfDelegationNotAllowed
errors.msg: Delegators cannot delegate to themselves

errors.name: InvalidTreasuryAction
errors.msg: Treasury action payload is invalid

errors.name: TokenMintRequired
errors.msg: SendToken action requires token_mint

errors.name: TreasuryRecipientMismatch
errors.msg: Executor must use action recipient

errors.name: InvalidTreasuryTokenAuthority
errors.msg: Treasury token account must be treasury-owned

errors.name: InvalidTokenMint
errors.msg: Provided token mint does not match action

errors.name: InvalidTokenProgram
errors.msg: Token program account does not match the supplied mint/accounts

errors.name: RecipientOwnerMismatch
errors.msg: Recipient token owner does not match action

errors.name: DuplicateTokenAccounts
errors.msg: Treasury token source and recipient token destination must differ

errors.name: InvalidTokenAccount
errors.msg: Token account is invalid or owned by wrong program

errors.name: GoverningMintMismatch
errors.msg: Governing mint must match DAO governance token

errors.name: DelegationOverlap
errors.msg: Direct voting and delegation cannot overlap for the same proposal

errors.name: DirectVoteAlreadyCommitted
errors.msg: Delegation is blocked because this wallet already committed directly

errors.name: UnsupportedTreasuryAction
errors.msg: CustomCPI actions are reserved and not executable in the current release

errors.name: UnauthorizedZkAnchor
errors.msg: Only the DAO authority or proposal proposer may anchor zk proof material

errors.name: UnauthorizedZkVerifier
errors.msg: Only the DAO authority may record zk_enforced receipts; proposers may only record parallel receipts

errors.name: InvalidZkArtifactHash
errors.msg: ZK proof anchor hashes must be non-zero

errors.name: InvalidZkVerificationMode
errors.msg: Phase A only allows the parallel on-chain verification mode

errors.name: ZkProofAnchorMismatch
errors.msg: The provided zk proof anchor does not match the expected proposal-bound layer

errors.name: UnauthorizedZkModeConfig
errors.msg: Only the DAO authority may enable zk_enforced mode; proposers may only configure non-enforced zk modes

errors.name: ProposalZkModeLocked
errors.msg: Proposal zk mode can only be configured before commits or reveals begin

errors.name: ZkVerificationReceiptMissing
errors.msg: Required zk verification receipt is missing

errors.name: ZkVerificationReceiptMismatch
errors.msg: Provided zk verification receipt does not match the expected proposal-bound layer

errors.name: ProposalNotZkEnforced
errors.msg: Selected proposal is not configured for zk_enforced finalization

errors.name: ProposalZkModeImmutable
errors.msg: Once a proposal is locked to zk_enforced mode it cannot be downgraded or reconfigured

errors.name: InsufficientZkVerificationMode
errors.msg: This proposal requires zk_enforced verification receipts, not only parallel receipts

errors.name: ZkVerifierProgramRequired
errors.msg: zk_enforced receipts must identify the verifier program boundary

errors.name: UnauthorizedConfidentialPayoutOperator
errors.msg: Only the DAO authority or proposal proposer may configure confidential payout plans

errors.name: ConfidentialPayoutPlanLocked
errors.msg: Confidential payout plans can only be configured before commits or reveals begin

errors.name: ConfidentialPayoutPlanMismatch
errors.msg: Confidential payout plan does not match the expected proposal-bound PDA

errors.name: InvalidConfidentialPayoutPlan
errors.msg: Confidential payout plan is invalid

errors.name: ConfidentialManifestUriTooLong
errors.msg: Confidential payout encrypted manifest URI must be non-empty and at most 256 characters

errors.name: ConfidentialPayoutAlreadyFunded
errors.msg: This proposal already executed its confidential payout batch

errors.name: ConfidentialPayoutTokenMintRequired
errors.msg: Token payout batches require a token mint

errors.name: ConfidentialPayoutConflictsWithTreasuryAction
errors.msg: Confidential payout plans cannot coexist with a direct treasury action on the same proposal

errors.name: UseConfidentialPayoutExecution
errors.msg: This proposal must execute through the confidential payout path rather than the standard treasury execution path

errors.name: UnauthorizedRefheOperator
errors.msg: Only the DAO authority may settle REFHE envelopes; proposers may only configure them before voting starts

errors.name: InvalidRefheEnvelope
errors.msg: REFHE envelope is invalid

errors.name: RefheEnvelopeMismatch
errors.msg: REFHE envelope does not match the expected proposal-bound payout plan

errors.name: RefheEnvelopeLocked
errors.msg: REFHE envelope is locked and cannot be changed in the current lifecycle state

errors.name: RefheSettlementRequired
errors.msg: REFHE settlement is required before executing this confidential payout plan

errors.name: RefheVerifierProgramRequired
errors.msg: REFHE settlement must identify the verifier program boundary

errors.name: UnauthorizedMagicBlockOperator
errors.msg: Only the DAO authority may settle MagicBlock private payment corridors; proposers may only configure them before voting starts

errors.name: InvalidMagicBlockCorridor
errors.msg: MagicBlock private payment corridor is invalid

errors.name: MagicBlockCorridorLocked
errors.msg: MagicBlock private payment corridors are locked in the current lifecycle state

errors.name: MagicBlockCorridorMismatch
errors.msg: MagicBlock private payment corridor does not match the expected proposal-bound payout plan

errors.name: MagicBlockTokenMintRequired
errors.msg: MagicBlock private payment corridor requires a token payout mint

errors.name: MagicBlockSettlementRequired
errors.msg: MagicBlock private payment corridor settlement is required before executing this confidential payout plan

errors.name: MagicBlockApiBaseUrlTooLong
errors.msg: MagicBlock API base URL must be non-empty and at most 128 characters

errors.name: MagicBlockClusterTooLong
errors.msg: MagicBlock cluster selector must be non-empty and at most 64 characters

errors.name: InvalidSecurityPolicy
errors.msg: DAO security policy is invalid

errors.name: SecurityPolicyAlreadyInitialized
errors.msg: DAO security policy was already initialized with a different configuration

errors.name: PolicyRollbackNotAllowed
errors.msg: DAO security policy updates cannot roll back to weaker enforcement

errors.name: InvalidGovernancePolicy
errors.msg: DAO governance policy v3 is invalid

errors.name: GovernancePolicyAlreadyInitialized
errors.msg: DAO governance policy v3 was already initialized with a different configuration

errors.name: GovernancePolicyMismatch
errors.msg: DAO governance policy v3 does not match the expected DAO or authority

errors.name: GovernancePolicySnapshotMismatch
errors.msg: Proposal governance snapshot v3 does not match the proposal or DAO

errors.name: GovernancePolicySnapshotAlreadyRecorded
errors.msg: Proposal governance snapshot v3 was already recorded under a different policy

errors.name: InvalidSettlementPolicyV3
errors.msg: DAO settlement policy v3 is invalid

errors.name: SettlementPolicyAlreadyInitialized
errors.msg: DAO settlement policy v3 was already initialized with a different configuration

errors.name: SettlementPolicyRollbackNotAllowed
errors.msg: DAO settlement policy updates cannot roll back to weaker execution requirements

errors.name: SettlementPolicyMismatch
errors.msg: DAO settlement policy v3 does not match the expected DAO or authority

errors.name: SettlementPolicySnapshotMismatch
errors.msg: Proposal settlement snapshot v3 does not match the proposal, DAO, or payout plan

errors.name: SettlementPolicySnapshotAlreadyRecorded
errors.msg: Proposal settlement snapshot v3 was already recorded under a different policy

errors.name: SettlementEvidenceTooFresh
errors.msg: Settlement evidence is still too fresh for V3 execution

errors.name: PayoutAmountExceedsSettlementCap
errors.msg: Confidential payout amount exceeds the V3 settlement cap

errors.name: InvalidRevealRebateConfig
errors.msg: Reveal rebate configuration is invalid for V3 governance mode

errors.name: RevealRebateVaultMismatch
errors.msg: Reveal rebate vault PDA does not match the DAO v3 governance configuration

errors.name: SecurityPolicyMismatch
errors.msg: DAO security policy does not match the expected DAO

errors.name: SecurityPolicyDisabled
errors.msg: DAO security policy is emergency-disabled

errors.name: StrictPolicyRequired
errors.msg: This instruction requires a strict or threshold-attested policy

errors.name: AttestationThresholdNotMet
errors.msg: Required attestor threshold was not met by transaction signers

errors.name: PolicySnapshotMismatch
errors.msg: Proposal policy snapshot does not match the proposal or DAO

errors.name: PolicySnapshotAlreadyRecorded
errors.msg: Proposal policy snapshot was already recorded under a different policy

errors.name: ProofVerificationMismatch
errors.msg: Proof verification companion account does not match the proposal or DAO

errors.name: ProofVerificationAlreadyRecorded
errors.msg: Proof verification was already recorded with a different strict payload

errors.name: ProofVerificationNotVerified
errors.msg: Proof verification is not in verified status

errors.name: StaleProofVerification
errors.msg: Proof verification is stale or expired

errors.name: PayloadHashMismatch
errors.msg: Proof payload hash does not match canonical executable payload

errors.name: UnsupportedVerificationKind
errors.msg: Verification kind is not supported in this release

errors.name: InvalidSettlementEvidence
errors.msg: Settlement evidence is invalid

errors.name: SettlementEvidenceMismatch
errors.msg: Settlement evidence does not match the payout plan, proposal, or DAO

errors.name: SettlementEvidenceAlreadyRecorded
errors.msg: Settlement evidence was already recorded with different strict evidence

errors.name: SettlementEvidenceNotVerified
errors.msg: Settlement evidence is not verified

errors.name: StaleSettlementEvidence
errors.msg: Settlement evidence is stale or not yet valid

errors.name: InvalidGovernanceSnapshot
errors.msg: Proposal governance snapshot requires a non-zero eligible capital supply
